comment2: Copy this file to config.json and edit with YOUR paths
comment3: IMPORTANT: config.json is in .gitignore - your local config won't be committed!
comment_paths: ⚙️ REQUIRED: Set these paths for your system
comment_steamCmdPath: Optional: Leave empty string "" if not installed
comment_ports_info: Each preset can have its own port. See presets/*.json

logRotation.comment_maxSizeMb: Rotate admin.log when it exceeds this size
logRotation.comment_maxFiles: Keep max N archived files (50 MB total)
logRotation.comment_maxAgeDays: Delete logs older than N days
